title: MENTAL HEALTH AND CHEMICAL DEPENDENCY TREATMENT - 211info
text: STAYTON OUTPATIENT CLINIC MENTAL HEALTH AND CHEMICAL DEPENDENCY TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Programs include outpatient mental health services, outpatient chemical dependency treatment, and substance use disorder counseling. Treatment incorporates individual, group, and family counseling. Additional assistance includes DUII services, adolescent services, corrections services, smoking cessation, and primary medical care. 631 N 1st Avenue Stayton, OR 97383 Eligibility: Age 13 and older Hours: Intake hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5:30pm Program hours vary Email (971) 772-4309 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (971) 772-4309 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information. Medical assessment to be completed at program intake. FEES: Accepts Oregon Health Plan (OHP), Willamette Valley Community Health (WVCH), DMAP, and private pay. Some payment support available for Marion County residents only. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5:30pm Services: Assessment for Substance Use Disorders Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment * Adolescents DUI Offender Programs Integrated Co-Occurring Disorders Treatment Mental Health Evaluation Smoking/Vaping Cessation Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - PROBLEM GAMBLING TREATMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. STAYTON OUTPATIENT CLINIC
